title: SQLancer query with wrong results
poc: CREATE TABLE "sys"."t0" ("c0" BOOLEAN,"c1" DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL);
SELECT ALL t0.c0 FROM t0 WHERE (((0.654013919354451) BETWEEN SYMMETRIC (t0.c1) AND ("length"(upper(''))))OR(t0.c0));
key_bug_features: Incorrect results from SQL query with BETWEEN condition
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE "sys"."t1" ("c0" BOOLEAN, "c1" DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL, "c2" INTEGER DEFAULT 0);
SELECT t1.c0 FROM "sys"."t1" WHERE (1.0 BETWEEN t1.c1 AND (SELECT MAX(c2) FROM "sys"."t1" WHERE c0 IS NOT NULL)) OR t1.c0;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "sys"."t1" WHERE (t1.c1 BETWEEN 1.0 AND 3.0) AND (t1.c0 IS NULL OR t1.c2 > 5);
